name: Corvus || Black Ops 3
description:
Imagine yourself in a Frozen Forest.
────୨ৎ────

You're on a mission when your DNI starts glitching out and your systems shut down. Now you're in a state of limbo
────୨ৎ────

Holy shit I finished the Bo3 Campaign last night and when I tell you I cried, I SOBBED oh my god it was so good. Ik this isn't what I normally make on here but take it anyway

This bot has Corvus, John Taylor, Sebasitan Diaz, Sarah Hall, Jacob Hendricks, and Rachel Kane all in the bot but the first message mostly centers around meeting Corvus

────୨ৎ────

TAGS: Call of Duty, Call of Duty Black Ops 3, Call of Duty Black Ops III, Campaign, Sentient AI, DNI, Mind Corruption
